versions.version_description: Easy to play with capo in 3rd freet. Into The Nigth - Benny Mardones - 1980. Chords based on this version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9URZgAqeqo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab]NC         [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]AbM7[/ch]
She's just sixteen years old, leave her alone, they say[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]AbM7[/ch]
Separated by fools, who don't know what love is yet, but I want you to know[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  -   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up, I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]     -    [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]        ( [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch] ) x3 [ch]Fm[/ch]
And show you a love, like you've never seen, ever seen[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]Cm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]AbM7[/ch]
It's like having a dream, where nobody has a heart[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]AbM7[/ch]
It's like having it all, and watching it fall apart[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Cm[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]AbM7[/ch]
And I would wait till the end, of time for you, and do it again, it's true[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]AbM7[/ch]
I can't measure my love, there's nothing to compare it to, but I want you to know[/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  -   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up, I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And show you a love, ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  -   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up, I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]     -    [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]        
And show you a love, like you've never seen, ever seen[/tab]

Solo: [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  -   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up, I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And show you a love, ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]  -   [ch]Ab[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up, I'd take you into the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]     -    [ch]Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]        
And show you a love, like you've never seen, ever seen[/tab]

(repeat, fade, ad lib)
